title: padus serotina f. cartilaginea
intro: Padus serotina f. cartilaginea, also known as a variety of the European Bird Cherry or Padus serotina, is a deciduous shrub or small tree with white flowers and red fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Padus serotina f. cartilaginea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and support the immune system. It is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used in salves and creams to promote skin health and wound healing.
